title: Animated items ++
description:
Animated items for minecraft 1.18+

this resource pack adds more animated items to the game.

V1.3
body: # ✨ Animated Items++: Enhanced Item Animations! ✨ [![🎥 Watch the Animated Items++ Video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/J-Q8DEj66h0/0.jpg)](https://youtu.be/J-Q8DEj66h0) **Animated Items++** builds on the foundation of VRabb-gh’s iconic resource pack, adding polished animations for a captivating visual experience in Minecraft. This pack transforms standard icons into lively, animated items, enriching both survival and creative gameplay with subtle animations. 🌟 --- ## 🆕 Version 1.3 - New Items & Total Animations - **More Animated Items** ✨ Added animations for several new items, including: - 🔥 Campfire - 💙 Soul Campfire - 🔴 Redstone Dust - 💣 Gunpowder - 💧 Water Bucket - ❄️ Powder Snow Bucket - **Diamond and Netherite Armor** 💎🛡️ Dynamic animations for Diamond and Netherite armor pieces, enhancing immersion. - **Bug Fixes** 🛠️ Fixed issues in existing animations to ensure smoother, more consistent visual effects. - **Total Animations: 39** 🧮 This pack now includes **39** uniquely animated items, offering a richer visual experience in every corner of your inventory! ## 🖌️ Based on VRabb-gh’s Resource Pack This resource pack is a refined and modified version of VRabb-gh’s work, ideal for players who loved the original and want a fresh, animated twist. 🎉 --- Ideal for Minecraft players who enjoy immersive visuals and detailed, animated elements without changing gameplay mechanics! --- ## 👨‍💻 Future Updates I am currently working to change this pack to not only add animations to regular items but to also add animations to all enchanted books.Here is a little peek Finished animations (for now) --- And here's the future name and icon Animated and enchanted ✨ --- 💬 **Do you have a suggestion?** --- Feel free to contact me on Discord: `@elarturvr`
